# Pull Request

Thank you for contributing to the GHEVERHAN Commerce Platform.

Please complete this template before requesting a review.

---

# 1. Summary

Provide a concise description of this Pull Request.

Example:

- Add Customer Authentication
- Implement Product Search
- Refactor Checkout Service
- Fix Shipping Calculation

---

# 2. Business Value

Why is this change needed?

Describe:

- Business Problem
- Expected Benefit
- User Impact

---

# 3. Blueprint References

Select every related Blueprint document.

Examples:

- docs/foundation/01_MASTER_PLAN.md
- docs/modules/17_CHECKOUT.md
- docs/engineering/23_API_SPECIFICATION.md
- docs/management/30_CODING_STANDARDS.md

---

# 4. Type of Change

Select all that apply.

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Chore

---

# 5. Affected Modules

Select every affected module.

- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] REST API
- [ ] Database
- [ ] CMS
- [ ] Website Builder
- [ ] Admin Panel
- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] Product Catalog
- [ ] Cart
- [ ] Checkout
- [ ] Order
- [ ] Payment
- [ ] Shipping
- [ ] Notification
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure

---

# 6. Database Changes

- [ ] No

- [ ] Yes

If yes, describe:

- New Tables
- Modified Tables
- Migration Required
- Rollback Strategy

---

# 7. API Changes

- [ ] No

- [ ] Yes

If yes:

- Endpoint
- Request
- Response
- Breaking Change

---

# 8. Breaking Changes

- [ ] No

- [ ] Yes

If yes:

Describe migration steps.

---

# 9. Testing

Completed:

- [ ] Manual Testing
- [ ] Unit Test
- [ ] Feature Test
- [ ] Integration Test
- [ ] API Test
- [ ] Responsive Test
- [ ] Regression Test

Testing Notes

Describe the testing performed.

---

# 10. Security Review

Completed:

- [ ] Input Validation
- [ ] Authorization Verified
- [ ] Authentication Verified
- [ ] Sensitive Data Protected
- [ ] Error Handling Reviewed
- [ ] No Secrets Committed

---

# 11. Documentation

Documentation updated:

- [ ] README
- [ ] Blueprint
- [ ] API Specification
- [ ] Changelog
- [ ] None Required

---

# 12. AI Development Checklist

If AI was used.

- [ ] AI followed Blueprint
- [ ] AI followed Coding Standards
- [ ] AI followed AI Development Guide
- [ ] AI output reviewed manually
- [ ] No unnecessary complexity introduced

---

# 13. Code Quality Checklist

- [ ] Follows Coding Standards
- [ ] Business Logic in Service Layer
- [ ] No Duplicate Code
- [ ] No Hardcoded Values
- [ ] Reusable Components
- [ ] Proper Error Handling
- [ ] Naming Convention Followed

---

# 14. Performance Considerations

- Query Optimization
- Caching
- Pagination
- Lazy Loading
- Image Optimization

Explain improvements.

Anything reviewers should know.
